name: Arb Corporation Limited.
analysis: ARB's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$18.8000, stop A$17.8398, target A$21.0900 (2.38:1) — then trail it.
